calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Proof Of Transfer To Los Angeles County
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shannon Vener appeared by telephone for Comerica Bank & Trust (Trustee).

Mr. Vener stated that she is amenable to the trust being transferred to Los Angeles as the day to day activity is being handled there, and that it would be easier to take this petition off calendar and re-file it in Los Angeles. The First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is off calendar pending filing in Los Angeles. Status on proof of transfer to Los Angeles County is set for September 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-09-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Copy Of The Executed Trust
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Continued To May-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney, Christopher Dolan, to appear on May 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a copy of the executed Special Needs Trust has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Mar-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sandra Tan for Munther Qutami and Amor Qutami.
Shannon Grube appeared by telephone for Comerica Bank (Proposed Trustee).

The Court stated that the issue primarily is the Trustee's proposed fee schedule, and that ordinarily Trustees are compensated by the 1% guideline or $145.00 per hour, but not both. Ms. Grube stated that this is the standard fee schedule amongst corporate fiduciaries. The Court advised Counsel that it is prepared to approve the petition with the exception of the fee schedule and advised the parties to look at the rules regarding mutual funds and ETF's. The Court granted the Petition Re Substituted Judgment, but not the fee schedule (subject to review and modification of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
